problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: If Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient is applied to at, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.
